Remove unused imports that are either redundant with @SpringBootApplication or no longer needed.

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/Aut.general_idea: Clean up commented-out annotation that is no longer relevant.

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.general_idea: Replace separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation for brevity.
Remove imports for JoinColumn and ManyToOne that are no longer used in the code.
src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.human_impl: Removed import jakarta.persistence.JoinColumn and import jakarta.persistence.ManyToOne

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.general_idea: Comment out the ManyToOne relationship with Domain to disable the association.
src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.human_impl: Commented out @JoinColumn, @ManyToOne, and private Domain domain field

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.general_idea: Replaced separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation to reduce boilerplate.
Standardized indentation to use tabs and fixed spacing around annotations and operators for consistent code style.
Removed a duplicated Javadoc comment line that appeared twice for the id field.
Replaced separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation for brevity.
Added a new userId field to the User entity to store a specific user identifier.
Added a new domainUuid field to the User entity to store the domain's UUID.
Added a new apiKey field to the User entity for API authentication.
Added a new secretKey field to the User entity for API authentication.
Uncommented and fixed the Domain relationship mapping, correcting the referencedColumnName case and formatting.
src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.human_impl: @ManyToOne @JoinColumn(name = "domain_id", referencedColumnName = "id", insertable = false, updatable = false) private Domain domain;

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ent.general_idea: Added a new READ_ONLY_ADMIN value to the UserType enum to support a new user role.

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/rep.general_idea: Added a derived query method to find a user by their unique ID.
Added a derived query method to find a user by their username.

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ser.general_idea: Replaced generic HTTP method call with specific typed methods for authentication and resource management.
src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ser.human_impl: Replaced `Mono<String> callAcsApi(...)` with specific methods like `login`, `logout`, `createNetwork`, etc.

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ser.general_idea: Changed return type from raw String to ResponseEntity<JsonNode> for structured response handling.
Added necessary imports for new DTOs and response types.
src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ser.human_impl: Added imports for `ResponseEntity`, `JsonNode`, and various DTOs like `LoginRequest`, `CreateNetworkDTO`.

src/main/java/com/acs/authentication/ser.general_idea: Removed unused import for HttpMethod as it is no longer used in the interface.
Added a method to find a user by their unique ID.
Added a method to find a user by their username.
Removed an unused import statement for LoginResponse.

src/main/java/com/acs/web/dto/LoginReque.general_idea: Replace separate @Getter and @Setter annotations with the combined @Data annotation for conciseness.
Remove the unused 'domain' field from the LoginRequest DTO.

src/main/java/com/acs/web/dto/LoginRespo.general_idea: Add a new field to the LoginResponse DTO to include the JSessionID in the login response payload.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Add Spring Boot starter for Redis data access to support caching and session storage.
Add Spring Boot starter for caching abstraction.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization in JWT handling.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migration management.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency to support MySQL database migrations.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure Spring Cache to use Redis and set connection details for the authentication service.
Define the secret key used for signing and verifying JWT tokens.
Set the expiration time for JWT tokens to 1 hour in milliseconds.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Enable Flyway database migration tool with specific configuration settings.
src/main/resources/application.yml.human_impl:
flyway:
  enabled: true
  init-on-migrate: true
  locations: classpath:db/migration
  baseline-on-migrate: true
  validate-on-migrate: true
